basic_details.job_title: NIOT Junior Translation Officer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT), Chennai
basic_details.short_information: NIOT is recruiting 01 Junior Translation Officer post with Master’s Degree qualification, last date 15 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 35 years Age relaxation applicable for Central Govt. employees, Ex-servicemen, and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities as per Government of India rules. Crucial date for age calculation: Closing date of online application.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application. | Essential Qualification: | Master’s degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at degree level OR Master’s degree in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective subject OR Master’s degree in any subject other than Hindi/English with Hindi/English medium and relevant language subjects at degree level OR Recognized Diploma/Certificate course in Translation from Hindi to English & vice versa AND Two years of experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central/State Government Offices or PSUs. | Job Requirements: | Translation of official documents, publications, books, handbooks, brochures Proof reading of translations Implementation of Official Language Policy Organizing Hindi workshops and meetings Maintaining glossaries and terminology database

selection_process: Written Examination (Objective/Descriptive) Skill Test (Qualifying in nature)
Final selection will be made on the basis of marks obtained in the Written Examination from among those who qualify the Skill Test. Both tests will be conducted at NIOT Chennai only.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the official NIOT recruitment portal: https://niot.res.in/recruitment_details.php
NOC from present employer (if employed in Govt/PSU)
This is a direct recruitment post on regular basis.
No correspondence will be entertained regarding rejection or non-selection.
Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
Selected candidates are liable to serve anywhere in India at NIOT centres/project sites.
The Written Exam and Skill Test will be held only at NIOT Chennai.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIOT Junior Translation Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online application is 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NIOT JTO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy (Unreserved) for the post of Junior Translation Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NIOT Junior Translation Officer?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Hindi/English or any subject with Hindi & English as compulsory/elective subjects, plus a Diploma in Translation or 2 years of translation experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NIOT JTO 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for eligible categories as per GoI rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary of Junior Translation Officer in NIOT?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Level 06 with basic pay starting from Rs. 35,400 plus admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIOT Junior Translation Officer 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Written Examination and Skill Test (qualifying nature)

faq.question: Q7. Is experience compulsory for NIOT JTO Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have either a recognized Diploma/Certificate in Translation or minimum 2 years of translation experience from Hindi to English & vice versa.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the NIOT JTO Written Exam and Skill Test be conducted?
faq.answer: Both tests will be conducted only at NIOT Campus, Chennai.

faq.question: Q9. Can final year Master’s students apply for NIOT Junior Translation Officer 2026?
faq.answer: No, candidates must possess the required qualification as on the closing date of application.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for NIOT Junior Translation Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website https://niot.res.in/recruitment_details.php before 15 June 2026.
